title: Learn AWS IAM in less than 10 minutes
summary: AWS Developers tutorial on AWS Identity and Access Management covering core concepts like users, roles, and policies. The video explains IAM fundamentals using analogies, introduces least privilege as a security principle, and demonstrates IAM Access Analyzer for permission discovery. Topics include proper role assignment, policy construction, and avoiding security pitfalls like embedding access keys in code.
